name: tenshoku
style: Elegant single-weight LINE-ART illustration (outline style): the figure and every object are drawn as thin, luminous GOLD outlines on a deep navy background (#0e1024) — NOT filled color blocks, NOT a chibi/mascot, NOT a solid silhouette. Minimal and refined, plenty of empty space, a thin gold ground ellipse under the figure. Exactly one 'magical' / tool element glows softly in the specified family accent color; everything else stays gold line-art. This is a sword-and-sorcery fantasy 'job class' that embodies the profession with the tools of the trade. The figure is small, shown from behind or in clean profile — never a forward-facing face, keep the face plain/featureless. GENERIC fantasy only: no recognizable existing characters, monsters, franchises, or logos. STRICT: no text, no letters, no numbers, no real glyphs (any 'runes' must be abstract dots/shapes, never actual characters), no speech bubbles, no sun or large glowing disc, a single calm scene, no collage, no split panels.

items.prompt: Profession (Japanese job title): 営業. Draw this real-world profession as a "warrior / front-line fighter" fantasy job class, with the figure using the characteristic tools and gear of this job so the profession is recognizable. The single glowing accent element uses terracotta-orange light; everything else is thin gold line-art on deep navy. One calm, elegant scene.

Profession (Japanese job title): 教育・講師 (teacher / instructor). Draw as a gentle 'mentor / guide' fantasy job class: a robed figure in clean profile standing beside a large blank slate board on a wooden easel, pointing at the board with a long pointer stick; and IMPORTANTLY, two or three small children/students seated on a low bench in the foreground, seen from behind, looking up at the board attentively — the warmth of teaching comes from the listeners. A few luminous abstract shapes (circles, arcs, a spiral — never letters or numbers) float above the board. All figures with natural, anatomically correct arms and legs. The single glowing accent element uses emerald green light at the pointer's tip and the floating shapes; everything else is thin gold line-art on deep navy. No scrolls with writing, no books with text. One calm, warm scene.

TIER STYLING (覇者職 — top tier of the nation): make this scene distinctly more ornate and stately than a common job card — add an elegant thin-gold decorative arch or frame element around the scene, richer architectural detail (columns, a dais, hanging banners), finely patterned trim on the robes/garments, and a subtle laurel or crest motif. The gold linework may be denser and more intricate, but keep the same thin-line elegance and deep navy background.
